'''鈭歞-th-ch''' ('''dathacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbatten|unbatten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbatten|unbatten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-th-ch
|-
! Lemma
| dathacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dathachithi|dathachithi]] || [[word:dathachiji|dathachiji]] || [[word:dathachishi|dathachishi]] || [[word:dathachi|dathachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathachuthuth|dathachuthuth]] || [[word:dathachujuj|dathachujuj]] || [[word:dathachushush|dathachushush]] || [[word:dathach|dathach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathachuthu|dathachuthu]] || [[word:dathachuju|dathachuju]] || [[word:dathachushu|dathachushu]] || [[word:dathachu|dathachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathachufuth|dathachufuth]] || [[word:dathachufuj|dathachufuj]] || [[word:dathachufush|dathachufush]] || [[word:dathachuf|dathachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dathachethe|dathachethe]] || [[word:dathacheje|dathacheje]] || [[word:dathacheshe|dathacheshe]] || [[word:dathache|dathache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathachothoth|dathachothoth]] || [[word:dathachojoj|dathachojoj]] || [[word:dathachoshosh|dathachoshosh]] || [[word:dathach|dathach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathachotho|dathachotho]] || [[word:dathachojo|dathachojo]] || [[word:dathachosho|dathachosho]] || [[word:dathacho|dathacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathachofoth|dathachofoth]] || [[word:dathachofoj|dathachofoj]] || [[word:dathachofosh|dathachofosh]] || [[word:dathachof|dathachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dathach忙th忙|dathach忙th忙]] || [[word:dathach忙j忙|dathach忙j忙]] || [[word:dathach忙sh忙|dathach忙sh忙]] || [[word:dathach忙|dathach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathachathath|dathachathath]] || [[word:dathachajaj|dathachajaj]] || [[word:dathachashash|dathachashash]] || [[word:dathach|dathach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathachatha|dathachatha]] || [[word:dathachaja|dathachaja]] || [[word:dathachasha|dathachasha]] || [[word:dathacha|dathacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathachafath|dathachafath]] || [[word:dathachafaj|dathachafaj]] || [[word:dathachafash|dathachafash]] || [[word:dathachaf|dathachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dathachasha|dathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godathachasha|godathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidathachasha|gokidathachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dathachn眉sha|dathachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godathachnkn眉sha|godathachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidathachn眉sha|gokidathachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dathachsh毛sha|dathachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godathachnksh毛sha|godathachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidathachsh毛sha|gokidathachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dathachrosha|dathachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godathachnkrosha|godathachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidathachrosha|gokidathachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dathachmusha|dathachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godathachnkmusha|godathachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidathachmusha|gokidathachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dathachsherasha|dathachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godathachnksherasha|godathachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidathachsherasha|gokidathachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dathachngasha|dathachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godathachnkngasha|godathachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidathachngasha|gokidathachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dathachyasha|dathachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godathachnkyasha|godathachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidathachyasha|gokidathachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dathachyamasha|dathachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godathachnkyamasha|godathachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidathachyamasha|gokidathachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dathachn眉sh毛sha|dathachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godathachnkn眉sh毛sha|godathachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidathachn眉sh毛sha|gokidathachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dathachn眉rosha|dathachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godathachnkn眉rosha|godathachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidathachn眉rosha|gokidathachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dathachn眉musha|dathachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godathachnkn眉musha|godathachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidathachn眉musha|gokidathachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dathachsh毛n眉sha|dathachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godathachnksh毛n眉sha|godathachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidathachsh毛n眉sha|gokidathachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dathachsh毛rosha|dathachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godathachnksh毛rosha|godathachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidathachsh毛rosha|gokidathachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dathachsh毛musha|dathachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godathachnksh毛musha|godathachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidathachsh毛musha|gokidathachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dathachron眉sha|dathachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godathachnkron眉sha|godathachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidathachron眉sha|gokidathachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dathachrosh毛sha|dathachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godathachnkrosh毛sha|godathachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidathachrosh毛sha|gokidathachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dathachromusha|dathachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godathachnkromusha|godathachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidathachromusha|gokidathachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dathachmun眉sha|dathachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godathachnkmun眉sha|godathachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidathachmun眉sha|gokidathachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dathachmush毛sha|dathachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godathachnkmush毛sha|godathachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidathachmush毛sha|gokidathachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dathachmurosha|dathachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godathachnkmurosha|godathachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidathachmurosha|gokidathachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dathach|dathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙th忙ch|d忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodathach|hodathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙th忙ch|hod忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodathach|hohodathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙th忙ch|hohod忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dathach|n眉dathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙th忙ch|n眉d忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dathach|n眉n眉dathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙th忙ch|n眉n眉d忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dathach|n茂dathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙th忙ch|n茂d忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dathach|n茂n茂dathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙th忙ch|n茂n茂d忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludathach|ludathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙th忙ch|lud忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludathach|luludathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙th忙ch|lulud忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidathach|lidathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙th忙ch|lid忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidathach|lilidathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙th忙ch|lilid忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodathach|kodathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙th忙ch|kod忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodathach|kokodathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙th忙ch|kokod忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedathach|kedathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙th忙ch|ked忙th忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedathach|kekedathach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙th忙ch|keked忙th忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
